feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Replacing SMTP with Microsoft Graph API for Workflow Email Notifications in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We have a requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to replace the standard SMTP-based email sending mechanism with Microsoft Graph API for sending email notifications from Procurement Workflows (PO status updates).

Currently:

  • We are using a standard flexible workflow for purchase orders.

  • Email notifications are sent via the standard SMTP configuration in Communication Arrangement.

  • These emails are triggered by workflow steps (approval, rejection, status update, etc.).

New requirement:

  • Due to corporate IT/security policy, SMTP usage is restricted.

  • We are required to use Microsoft Graph API (OAuth 2.0) for sending emails instead of SMTP.

We would like to understand:

  1. Is it technically possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud to replace standard SMTP with Microsoft Graph API for workflow emails?

  2. Is there any standard SAP-supported alternative to SMTP for outbound emails (for example, via SAP BTP services or API-based mail service)?

  3. Can workflow email notifications be redirected to:

    • SAP BTP (via API), and

    • then sent using the Microsoft Graph API from BTP?

  4. Are there any SAP Notes or official documentation confirming:

    • SMTP is mandatory for workflow emails, or

    • Is API-based email sending supported?

  5. Has anyone implemented a similar scenario using

    • SAP Build Process Automation / BTP Integration Suite / custom service with MS Graph API?

Our goal is to:

  • Avoid SMTP completely, and

  • Use Microsoft Graph API with OAuth authentication for all outbound workflow email notifications.

Any guidance on:

  • Supported architecture,

  • Limitations in S/4HANA Public Cloud,

  • or recommended best practice would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Exclude Billing Document from Scheduling Job if Allocation Number is not present
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 
We are looking for option to exclude the Billing documents that did not get 'Allocation Number' from E-Invoicing - Cockpit. 
Is there any BADI, Enhancement Spot or another system configuration to exclude the Billing document not to go Scheduled Billing Output if the Allocation Number is not present for that Billing document?
The process is: 
  1. Billing Document is created 
  2. Billing document goes to E-document (Job Run every 2 Min)
  3. Scheduled Billing Output (to Process Output To Complete)
Thank you in advance!

entry.title: #CoE CSRI How to manage data restore in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

If there's data issue in PRD instance, can we request for database restore? What's the process? Thanks!

Eric

entry.title: Fetch data in Adobe forms using standard cds in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I my billing invoice form, I am trying to fetch additional data using custom logic implementation and custom fields. Currently I have exhausted the limit for creating custom fields.

I wanted to know if there is any alternate solution for this. Is it possible to fetch data from standard cds or standard API directly in my forms without using custom fields.
Is it possible to use scripts to fetch the data directly.

 

Regards,

Rakshna M

entry.title: Edocument cockpit for ksef
entry.content:
Hello experts,

As we have implemented ksef2.0 and tries to submit the document in Edocument cockpit Whereas it throws errors as it taxcodes are missing howeevr we havemaintained all taxcodes already .

Could someone suggest how can this recified.

entry.title: Functional Area Assignment Limitation at WBS Level During Enterprise Project Migration
entry.content:
Dear Expert.

I’m trying to mass-create Enterprise Projects using the Migration Your Data app.
However, it seems that Functional Area cannot be assigned at an individual WBS level.
When a Functional Area is entered at the Project level, it is propagated to all subordinate WBS elements.

In our case, Functional Area needs to be differentiated by the characteristics of each WBS under the same Project.

Is it correct that this functionality is not supported?
Is it not possible to assign Functional Area at the individual WBS level during migration?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Question on Difference Between Manage Bank Statements and Japan-Specific Import App
entry.content:
This question is about bank statement processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (Japan localization)

 

 

Hello. We are a Japanese company using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

We would like to ask about the purpose and functional differences between the following two Fiori apps:

  • Manage Bank Statements (App ID: F1564)

  • Import Bank Statement – XML Format Japan (App ID: IBSX_JP)
    (Japanese name: 銀行報告書のインポート – XML 形式（日本）)

We understand that the Manage Bank Statements app does not support the Japanese Zenginkyo format, and that the Japan-specific import app exists to handle Japanese bank statement formats.

However, from an operational perspective, we would prefer to manage bank statements in a single place as much as possible—ideally using only the Manage Bank Statements app.

We are therefore considering creating a custom Zengin format within the Manage Bank Statements app instead of using the Japan-specific import app. Before proceeding, we would like to understand whether the Japan-localized app provides any additional functionality beyond simply importing and processing bank statements.

In particular, we are concerned about potential side effects, such as:

  • Differences in posting logic

  • Impacts on automatic clearing (for example, Invoice Summary receivables)

  • Any Japan-specific processes that might not be covered if we use only the Manage Bank Statements app

Could you please provide your expert opinion on the differences between:

  • Using the standard Manage Bank Statements app, and

  • Using the Japan-specific Import Bank Statement – XML Format Japan app?

Any guidance on whether it is safe to consolidate processing into the Manage Bank Statements app would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: C_S4CFi- Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m preparing for the certification C_S4CFi –Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Financial Accounting , and I understand that the exam format has evolved recently.

For those who have taken it recently, could you please share your experience?

I’m especially interested in:

  • How the exam is structured (knowledge vs practical parts)

  • The level of difficulty compared to the learning journey content

  • The type of tasks or scenarios you encountered (process execution, configuration, troubleshooting, etc.)

  • How much hands-on system familiarity is really required

  • Any advice on what to focus on during preparation

Any feedback or tips would be greatly appreciated 
Thanks in advance for your help

entry.title: Additional Quantity 1 missing as Reference Key Figure in Top-Down Distribution
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working with the Manage Allocations app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and configuring a Top-Down Distribution (TDD).

I need to use QUANT1 – Additional Quantity 1 as the Variable Portion Type in Receiver Basis.

The issue is the following:

  • When configuring Top-Down Distribution, in Receiver Basis → Variable Portion Type, the dimension QUANT1 – Additional Quantity 1 is not available for selection.

  • The additional quantity QUANT1 is already configured and active, and we are successfully using it as a reference in PA distributions, where it does appear correctly.

  • However, does not appear in Top-Down Distribution in the Manage Allocations app.

My question:

  • What should I do to make Additional Quantity 1 appear and be usable as a Variable Portion Type in TDD?

Any clarification or documentation reference would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to disable the Manage My Substitution option in the My Inbox App
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

we are encountering an issue regarding the My Inbox application in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. Employees are currently able to maintain their own task substitutions using the "Manage My Substitution" function available in the user menu of the My Inbox app.

Problem Overview

The business requirement is that employees should not have the ability to maintain their own substitutions.

We attempted to disable the functionality via the related Business Catalog (SAP_CA_BC_MYINBOX_PC), but there is no corresponding app or configuration option available to deactivate the substitution feature.
We found the documentation here:
However, the instructions do not clarify how to disable the built‑in substitution feature, especially because the My Inbox tile already exists and does not allow for custom tile configuration.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Billing remains possible, even though the Billing Block is set at the Sales Order header.
entry.content:
We have set the billing block on the sales order at header level but the invoice was still created.

entry.title: Unable to maintain reason for price change in Manage Price - Sales app
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are unable to maintain a reason or remarks for price changes in the Manage Price – Sales app.

Could you please advise where remarks or a reason for price change can be maintained while creating or updating the sales price in the Price List app?

Your guidance on the recommended approach or configuration would be appreciated.

entry.title: 公有云版本生产订单误关闭，跨月后可以重新打开么
entry.content: 上月月结后，错误的关闭了一个生产订单（CO07创建，有投料与报工，未打TECO），本月期间发现后，可以CO02取消CLSD继续投料么？订单结算规则是维护到WBS上的

entry.title: Unable to access the VK11 'Create Condition Records for Pricing in Sales'
entry.content:
Unable to access the VK11 application in our SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment. Even though we have created the required roles/authorizations and assigned them to our user, the application is still not available and remains unsearchable in the search bar (Fiori Launchpad / App Finder).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: End of Support indirect quotations BYOR (1S4)
entry.content:
As part of the information on release upgrade 2602, we have determined that the import of indirect quotations for the BYOR solution of scope item 1S4 will no longer be supported. 

In Europe and Germany, the European Central Bank (ECB) and the German Bundesbank are primarily available for retrieving exchange rates. Both institutions publish exchange rates for indirect quotation only.

Will the function for retrieving indirect quotations for the BYOR solution be completely disabled with release 2602?
If so, which institutions are recommended for retrieving direct quotations?

entry.title: TDR test environment scaling
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I'm preparation for you TDR Test refresh environment.  We would like to get confirmation that the Test environment is scaled appropriately to handle our Production volume. 

Could you please confirm that this will not be an issue? 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Dispute management : New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is now working as expected
entry.content:
• New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is now working as expected
  • New Versus Solved Disputes – Today App is showing wrong data for the Processor for Number of Disputes Current Month.

It is not showing correct data in the report

1. Dispute cases created in this month and assigned same processers for all the dispute cases

2. But in the app New Versus Solved Disputes – Today

When filtered ( By Dispute case( table current month )) it is showing correctly


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to automate NBP T-1 Exchange Rate logic in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working on an S/4HANA Public Cloud project for a client in Poland. We have successfully automated the exchange rate feed from the National Bank of Poland (NBP) using the standard Datafeed (Refinitiv/MRM).

Polish VAT law requires using the exchange rate from the last working day preceding the service delivery (T-1 rule).

The automated feed correctly saves the rate with its true publication date (e.g., Jan 13 rate valid from Jan 13).

For an invoice created on Jan 14, the system should automatically pick up the Jan 13 rate.

The Issue: In standard SAP, the billing document looks for a rate matching the billing date. The customer currently uses a manual workaround by "shifting" the validity date of the Jan 13 rate to Jan 14 during manual upload so the system finds it. Since we are moving to automation, we can no longer "fake" the validity dates.

Question: What is the best practice in Public Cloud to handle this? I am considering using the BAdI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER to set the Exchange Rate Date to Billing Date - 1.

- Is this the recommended approach for Poland local requirements?

- Are there any pitfalls with this BAdI approach regarding intercompany or credit memos?

- Is there a standard configuration setting I might be missing that handles this "look-back" logic natively?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: EBRR postings did not post
entry.content:
We had our FI periods closed for Jan 2026 but the CO period was open for the same. Time confirmation postings had happened in Jan (CO documents for allocations - Credit Cost Center & Debit- WBS) at that time and since the FI periods were closed the EBRR postings for the WIP & Unbilled Revenue did not post. Now if we open the FI period for Jan, will we be able to trigger this posting - if not is there an alternate method to automatically post the WIP & Unbilled Revenue entries?

Thanks

Sebastian James

entry.title: How can Change project profile when copy Project
entry.content:
Dear Expert 

For copy project from A to B but we 'd like to change Project profile from Investment to Overhead 

Are there any way to change Profile because now the profile after copied is same and field isn't open to edit 

Thanks for your support 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
